name: AWS root account API activity
description: Finds CloudTrail API activity attributed to the AWS account root identity. Root use should be rare but can be legitimate break-glass administration.

attack.name: Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts
attack.mapping_condition: Apply only when investigation indicates unauthorized or compromised cloud-account use.

query.text:
index=<configured-index> sourcetype=aws:cloudtrail userIdentity.type=Root eventType=AwsApiCall
| table _time recipientAccountId awsRegion eventSource eventName sourceIPAddress userAgent errorCode
| sort -_time

false_positives: Initial account setup that has been separately approved
triage: Verify whether root use was authorized and time-bounded.
Review MFA status, source network, user agent, and adjacent API calls.
Escalate unexplained activity and rotate root credentials according to the incident plan.
